examples: Unmotivated students, in contrast, feel like they are forced to learn and get bored easily with this seemingly endless process.
Often these children realize that they know more than their teachers, and their teachers often feel that these children are arrogant, inattentive, or unmotivated.
They may get lazy and unmotivated if they know what is coming to them.
There have been rumors of renewed aggression at Infy sales team in Bangalore and rumblings of disgruntled, unmotivated employees.
